'''Arbran III''' was the third [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]] around the [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Arbran]]. It was located in the [[Arbran system]]<ref name="Arbra Part 1" /> in the [[Bon'nyuw-Luq sector/Legends|Bon'nyuw-Luq sector]],<ref name="EAOC" /> a part of the [[Trailing Sectors/Legends|Trailing Sectors]] portion of<ref name="TEA" /> the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. Arbran III's surface consisted of [[Water/Legends|ice]], and it was orbited by two [[Moon/Legends|moons]].<ref name="Arbra Part 1" />

==Behind the scenes==
Arbran III was mentioned in "Hole in the Ground," the first article in the series ''[[Arbra: Sanctuary In the Storm]]'', which was written by [[Cory J. Herndon]] for use with [[Wizards of the Coast]]'s ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]''. The article was published on [[Wizards.com]] on [[June 5]], [[2003]], as part of the site's ''[[Planet Hoppers]]'' [[Roleplaying game|roleplaying]] series.<ref name="Arbra Part 1" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Arbran [[Star system/Legends|system]], thereby including Arbran III, in grid square N-17.<ref name="TEA" />
